name: Sinsera Kiosk
description: Pi 5 that boots straight into Chromium kiosk mode pointed at sinsera.co. Auto-login on tty1, openbox session, Chromium with --kiosk flags + screen blank disabled.

services.description: Autologin tty1 -> startx -> openbox autostart -> chromium kiosk

post_install_message: Insert SD, plug in HDMI + Ethernet (or pre-configure WiFi in dietpi.txt), power on. First boot takes 60-120 s as DietPi finalises; Chromium then launches full-screen on sinsera.co. Press Ctrl+Alt+F2 to escape to a console if needed.
authorization_notice: Builds a flashable .img. Standard kiosk Pi — no remote access enabled by default. To SSH in later, set AUTO_SETUP_DHCP_HOSTNAME + AUTO_SETUP_SSH_SERVER_INDEX=-1 in /boot/dietpi.txt before first boot.
